message.content:
@startuml
title usecase16 考试成绩复查

participant "GUI" as GUI {
}

actor User as user

control LoginControl <<controller>> as loginCtrl
entity ScoreReviewApplyEntity <<entity>> as scoreAppEnty


User -> GUI :登录系统（账号，密码）\ncreate(用户) 
activate GUI 

loginCtrl <- GUI  
scoreAppEnty <-- GUI  

note right of scoreAppEnty #lightyellow\n<font color=red>成绩复查申请结果</font>\n(复查结果)\nnote end 


deactivate GUI  


User --> GUI \ndelete （用户 ）



@enduml
